primary_language.description: The dominant language (e.g. TypeScript, Python, Rust)

architecture_summary.description: 2-3 sentence summary of the overall architecture and how major parts relate

directories.description: Every directory worth deep analysis. Include ALL significant directories, not just top-level.

role.description: The role this directory plays in the project

priority.description: How important this directory is for understanding the codebase. High = core business logic, medium = supporting code, low = config/assets

description.description: One-sentence description of what this directory contains

estimated_file_count.description: Approximate number of source files in this directory and its subdirectories

should_have_claude_md.description: Whether this directory has enough distinct conventions to warrant its own CLAUDE.md
